name: Chimps Life ( Discontinued and Replaced with Chimps Life Remastered )

reviews.review_description: Yo I just wanna say anyone reading this DOWNLOAD THE GAME I’m a dev for it and it’s amazing so ye
i love this game everyone is incredibly nice and it looks amazing the horror is really scary in my opinion and the map design is really good
Owner is cool owner is cool owner is cool owner is cool owner is cool owner is cool owner is cool owner is cool owner is cool owner is cool owner is cool
I am on the discord and in 99% sure that i was first to install when it was on sidequest.

I met you. To me it was five minutes ago but you’ll probably weeks months years idk I was reading gorilla tag games you were telling me all about the game. It was really cool you’re telling me about the space map  . And I had a really fun time. Now I’m really sad because I fell out of the map coming down from the clouds map. If there is a way to reply to this please do I love chimps life:-) :-) :-) :-) :-)￼

developer_response.body: i understand lol. you can friend me on discord server so we could talk there lol my username is Anemunt on discord

reviews.review_title: Hey owner its CJ from in game, DC invite

developer_response.body: i fixed the link so yeah. go ahead and try it now
